name: Remixpoint, Inc.
summary: Remixpoint, Inc. engages in the development and sale of energy management solutions, and energy-saving support consulting services in Japan. It also sells energy-saving equipment; and purchases and sells electric power. In addition, the company engages in the development and sale of used car assessment systems; buying and selling used cars; and consulting related to the buying and selling used cars. Further, the company engages in the management of transaction currency exchange; and planning, development, design, and operation of accommodation facilities. Remixpoint, Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
